notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for Macau SAR visitor entry authorization, aligned with the MO_VISIT_VISA form seed. Sources reviewed: Macao SAR Government Portal PS-1472 Authorization to Enter and Stay, PS-1472 application page, Public Security Police Force immigration service pages, and Macao Government Tourism Office entry requirements.

documents.title: Macau Authorization to Enter and Stay Visitor Requirements

chunks.title: Macau visitor authorization scope
chunks.content: Macau SAR entry rules distinguish visa or prior authorization requirements, visa exemption, and authorization to enter and stay at a checkpoint. Macao Government Tourism Office states that all visitors must hold a passport or valid travel document for travel to Macao and points users to the Macao Immigration Services of the Public Security Police Force for visa and entry permit exemption details. Visitors who are not exempt may need a visa, prior authorization to enter, or authorization upon arrival depending on nationality and circumstances.

chunks.title: Macau visitor document basics
chunks.content: Macau visitor intake should collect passport or travel document details, nationality, residence, travel purpose, intended entry date and duration, accommodation or host, itinerary, return or onward travel, financial means, and background declarations. Macao SAR Government Portal guidance notes that passports and travel documents accepted for immigration control should generally be valid for at least 90 days beyond the intended stay in Macao. VIZA should avoid blanket statements because visa exemption and visa-on-arrival treatment depend on nationality.

documents.title: Macau Authorization to Enter and Stay Process

chunks.title: Macau application and arrival channels
chunks.content: Macau SAR Government Portal describes prior authorization to enter and authorization to enter and stay. Persons who are not exempt from visa or prior authorization, and who do not wish to apply for authorization at the checkpoint, may ask a legal agent to apply to the Residence and Stay Affairs Department before travel if no Chinese diplomatic mission or other representative office is available in their residence location. Some travellers may instead obtain authorization to enter and stay at the checkpoint upon arrival.

chunks.title: Macau review guardrails
chunks.content: Macau visitor answers should truthfully match the actual travel purpose. Public Security Police Force guidance notes that non-residents with a visa or prior authorization have declared their purpose of entry in the application, and declaring a different non-tourism-equivalent purpose on arrival can affect entry. VIZA should route non-visitor purposes such as work, residence, study, or long-term stay away from MO_VISIT_VISA.

chunks.title: Macau supported VIZA form route
chunks.content: VIZA supports Macau Visit Visa as country macau and visaType MO_VISIT_VISA. When the user asks to apply for Macau visitor entry authorization, send an application_redirect block to /client/application?country=macau&visaType=MO_VISIT_VISA. Do not collect detailed application fields inside chat.

chunks.title: Macau fields and document preparation
chunks.content: The MO_VISIT_VISA form schema collects applicant identity, other names, nationality, passport and other travel documents, marital and contact details, Macau travel purpose, entry date, duration, accommodation, host details, prior Macau visits, refusals, criminal or deportation declarations, and document preparation such as passport bio page, photo, itinerary, accommodation, return ticket, funds, and host evidence where relevant.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for macau.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.gov.mo/en/services/ps-1472/ ; https://www.gov.mo/en/services/ps-1472/ps-1472a/?noredirect=en_US

Passport and identity fields:
- Copy of the bio data page of a valid passport/travel document;
- Copy of the bio data page of all travelers’ valid passport/travel document;
- Copy of the bio data page and used inside pages of a valid passport/travel document;

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- 38/2021, during entry to Macao, the passports, travel documents and any other documents accepted for the purpose of immigration control of non-residents must be valid for at least 90 days beyond the period of their intended stay in the Macao Special Administrative Region.

Travel plan and port fields:
- Persons who are not exempted from a visa or Prior Authorization to Enter [Note: Please refer to the Persons Exempted from a ‘Visa’ or ‘Prior Authorization to Enter’ by Law] and do not wish to apply for Authorization the Enter and Stay (so-called ‘visa-upon-arrival’) at the checkpoint at the moment they arrive at Macao may ask a legal agent to apply to the Re
- Starting from 29 January 2019, Nepalese, Pakistanis, Nigerians, Bangladeshis, Sri Lankans and Vietnamese (persons who are not exempted from a visa or Prior Authorization to Enter in their entry to Macao) may authorize Note 1 somebody to apply to the Residence and Stay Affairs Department for Prior Authorization to Enter only if they meet either one of the fol
- round-trip air ticket and hotel reservation receipts, etc.);

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- Contact Address: Immigration Building of the Public Security Police Force, Travessa Um do Cais de Pac On, Taipa, Macao
- Document of transportation to Macao and accommodation arrangement (e.g.
- round-trip air ticket and hotel reservation receipts, etc.);

Purpose, occupation, work, and study fields:
- Documents to be submitted according to purpose of visit
- For the purpose of study at a higher institute
- For the purpose of stay as family of non-resident workers

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
